stemHtml: Regarding take-off distances and speeds for take-off, which of the following answers is correct?

options.a: For a balanced field, the balanced V<sub>1</sub> would result in the same ASD, all-engine TOD and all-engine TOR.
options.b: At the runway limited take-off mass for a balanced field there is a single speed for V<sub>1</sub>.
options.c: The balanced V<sub>1</sub> is the maximum speed at which neither the one-engine-out TOD nor TOR are exceeded.
options.d: For a balanced field, the balanced V<sub>1</sub> would result in the same ASD, one-engine-out TOD and one-engine-out TOR.
